title: Buprestis gerardi
taxonomy: Buprestis gerardi is a species of beetle, specifically within the family Buprestidae. It belongs to the order Coleoptera. This beetle is further classified into the suborder Polyphaga and the infraorder Elateriformia. The Buprestidae family is part of the superfamily Buprestoidea. The classification of Buprestis gerardi reflects its position within the beetle classification system.
